actionCalls.name: Log_Created_Collection_of_requested_items
actionCalls.label: Log - Created Collection of requested items

value.stringValue: Successfully created collection of requested items

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_Address_to_Long_for_ASC_Lab
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - Address to Long for ASC Lab

value.stringValue: Failed Submitting Lab Order to Lab. Shipping Address field is too long for the ASC Lab
Failed Setting Lab Provider. See Lab Order Status Reason

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_Submit_API_Call_to_the_Lab
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - Submit API Call to the Lab

value.stringValue: Failed Submitting Lab Order to Lab via the API.

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_Submitting_API_Call_to_Lab
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - Submitting API Call to Lab

value.stringValue: Failed Submitting Lab Order to Lab via the API.
Autolaunch - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order Started
In Person Kit. Skip Shipping Check set to TRUE
PGT Kit not registered. Skip Shipping Check set to TRUE
Set Skip Demographic Check since service is PGT
Set Skip Demographic Check since service is Merchandise
Set Skip Demographic Check since service is PG Supplement/Book with Kit Id already assinged

actionCalls.name: Log_Success_API_Call_to_Lab
actionCalls.label: Log - Success - API Call to Lab

value.stringValue: Successfully Submitted Lab Order to the Lab via the API.

assignments.name: Assign_new_Lab_Order_Values_From_Subflow
assignments.label: Assign new Lab Order Values From Subflow

assignments.name: Clear_Scheduled_Date_to_Be_Submitted_to_Lab_field
assignments.label: Clear Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab field

assignments.name: Set_Dates_on_Lab_Oder_Success
assignments.label: Set Dates on Lab Oder - Success

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_Failed_Requested_Items
assignments.label: Set Error Message - Failed Requested Items

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_Missing_Kit_Id_for_In_Person
assignments.label: Set Error Message - Missing Kit Id for In Person

assignments.description: Uses the height and weight metric calculation from Map Apex Class and assigns the values to the Lab Order
assignments.name: Set_Height_and_Weight
assignments.label: Set Height and Weight

assignments.name: Set_Initial_Submission_Date_and_Lab_Order_Date
assignments.label: Set Initial Submission Date and Lab Order Date

assignments.name: Set_Just_the_Initial_Submission_Date
assignments.label: Set Just the Initial Submission Date

assignments.description: this comes from the submit order api call
assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Id
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Id

assignments.description: We will set Skip Demographic to true because the first submission for a Precision Genetic Test is to the 3PL which ships the kit to the patient. Until they register is only when we know who they are.
assignments.name: Set_Skip_Demographic_Check_TRUE
assignments.label: Set Skip Demographic Check = TRUE

assignments.description: We will set Skip Demographic to true because Merchandise need to be submitted to NG without need to verify Demographic Data
assignments.name: Set_Skip_Demographic_Check_TRUE_Merchandise
assignments.label: Set Skip Demographic Check = TRUE

assignments.description: We will set Skip Demographic to true for the second submission for a Precision Genetic Supplements and Books so that they go to 3PL
assignments.name: Set_Skip_Demographic_Check_TRUE_SupplementBook
assignments.label: Set Skip Demographic Check = TRUE

assignments.description: Since this will be in person we don't need to check the shipping address before submitting the request
assignments.name: Set_Skip_Shipping_Check_TRUE
assignments.label: Set Skip Shipping Check = TRUE

constants.description: Error message that needs to be assigned to the Lab Order in case the Address is to long
constants.name: txt_AddressLengthErrorMessage

value.stringValue: The lab ASC has a limit of 40 characters for the Shipping Street Address. Please check the Opportunity Shipping Address and fix or abbreviate the Shipping Street Address or click Reorder and select another lab for this order to be processed through.

decisions.description: If we are skipping demographic check, we are not assigning metric height and weight to the lab order. Since we are skipping it means that Demographic data for kit registration was not entered yet. If we don't have this decision we have an issue where the fields get populated from the account values.
decisions.name: Are_we_skipping_Demographic_Check
decisions.label: Are we skipping Demographic Check

decisions.description: Check if we set Requested Items earlier in the flow. This is usually the case with items that need be be submitted with distribution SKU (e.g. Precision Supplements)
decisions.name: Did_We_Already_Set_Requested_Items
decisions.label: Did We Already Set Requested Items

decisions.name: Did_we_fail_at_creating_the_Requested_Items
decisions.label: Did we fail at creating the Requested Items

decisions.description: Check if the Lab Order has Lab Provider assigned. If not the Lab order was not created from the Opportunity and we need to run a flow to assign a lab provider
decisions.name: Does_the_Lab_Order_have_Lab_Provider_Assigned
decisions.label: Does the Lab Order have Lab Provider Assigned

decisions.description: Check if shipping is required. If yes, we need to validate the shipping address
decisions.name: Does_the_Product_Require_Shipping
decisions.label: Does the Product Require Shipping

decisions.description: Here we check the product and if the product needs shipped or not. If not then we can continue, else we can skip the Shipping checks in Apex as well.
decisions.name: Does_this_Kit_Need_Shipped
decisions.label: Does this Kit Need Shipped

decisions.description: If service requested is Genetic Testing, we need to check the demographic data match before submitting
decisions.name: Is_It_Genetic_Testing
decisions.label: Is It Genetic Testing

decisions.description: Check if the returning error is In-Person Missing Kit Id Error. If yes, assign corresponding Lab Order status
decisions.name: Is_it_in_Person_Missing_Kit_Id_Error
decisions.label: Is it in Person Missing Kit Id Error

rightValue.stringValue: Kit Id is required for In Person Lab Orders

decisions.description: Check if the assigned Lab Provider is ASC and if the Shipping Street Address is longer than 40 characters. Due to the limitation on ASC side, we can't send them addresses longer than 40 characters. If this is the case, the API callout will not be made and Lab Order will be put On Hold with an appropriate error message
decisions.name: Is_the_address_street_longer_than_40_char
decisions.label: Is the address street longer than 40 char

decisions.description: Depending on what type of service we are performing, we will need to exclude certain checks from Apex. When this is Precision Genetic Test we are not doing checks for an Demographic details because we first need to send it to a 3PL to ship the kit to the patient.
decisions.name: What_Service_is_Being_Rendered
decisions.label: What Service is Being Rendered

rules.name: PGT_Supplement_Book_with_Lab_Order_Id
rules.label: PGT Supplement/Book with Lab Order Id

rules.name: PGT_Supplement_Book_No_Lab_Order_Id
rules.label: PGT Supplement/Book No Lab Order Id

Flow.description: This flow will submit an order to the internal API to signify a new lab order request is ready. This does a POST to the submitorder API endpoint.

formulas.description: Returns the character length of the Shipping Street Address
formulas.name: form_numAddressLength

Flow.interviewLabel: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order

subflows.name: Create_Collection_of_Requested_Items_PGT_no_Lab_Order_Id
subflows.label: Create Collection of Requested Items - PGT no Lab Order Id
